name: Lich
phrases: I have walked this earth for centuries...
Your soul calls to me, little worm.
You dare stand before one so ancient?
I remember your bloodline's first screams.
Bow, or I shall make you.
These trinkets mean nothing to my eternal eyes.
I feel your fear, mortal. It tastes exquisite.
Your flesh decays with each passing moment.
Forget your prayers—they will not save you.
I command the very bones beneath your feet.
Dark stars have whispered your name to me.
Your line ends here, now, by my hand.
The forgotten arts are mine to command.
Witness the power of my cursed spellfire!
Your end approaches with every breath.
I do not bleed. I do not break. I endure.
The dead rise at my merest word.
You are but dust to one as old as I.
I have seen empires crumble to ash.
Step closer, and taste oblivion.
Time itself bends to my ancient will.
No escape awaits you in this place.
Mummified screams echo through my robes.
Death knocks thrice for you, mortal thing.
I curse you with the weight of ages.
The shadows remember what you've forgotten.
Cold rises from the deepest void to claim you.
I weave the threads of your doom even now.
Your veins shall freeze as I drain your warmth.
You were always meant to serve me in death.
